title: Trident Weathering
description: A mod that lets the Player control the Weather with a Trident!
body:
**Trident Weathering allows you to control Minecraft's weather using tridents in unique and immersive ways.**
### 🌧️ Summon Rain
Point your trident towards the sky (looking almost straight up) and hold the use button. After a few seconds, you'll see visual rain cues that gradually intensify until it finally starts raining for real. It's like performing a ritual to summon the storm.
### ⚡ Create Thunderstorms
Throw a trident with Channeling enchantment towards the sky while it's raining. If the trident is pointing almost vertically upward, lightning bolts will start striking around it. Once enough bolts have fallen (configurable), the weather will change to a full thunderstorm.
### ☀️ Clear the Skies
Place a trident in an active conduit. The conduit will channel its power through the trident to gradually clear the weather, removing rain and storms. If the chunk is loaded, you can leave the trident in the conduit and will never rain again in the world.

_All mechanics are fully configurable from the server, allowing you to adjust wait times, required lightning bolts, probabilities, and more. The mod is optimized for performance and works in both single player and multiplayer servers._


<details>
<summary>😊</summary>

I'm planning to make an animated Minecraft video to introduce the mod, so stay tuned! ❤️

(Also a new icon and gallery images! 😂)

</details>
